  <script type="application/ld+json">
  {
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What is opencode OS \u2014 AI Agent Skill Store?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "opencode OS is a search-first, Raycast-style AI agent skill store containing 90+ production-grade developer skills across 6 zones (ACTIVATE, BUILD, VALIDATE, PLAYBOOK, MONETIZE, SYSTEM). It features a command palette (\u2318K), conversational recommendation engine, and zero-build PWA architecture."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "How do I install a skill from the store?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Each skill card has an install command (e.g. 'opencode skill add gsap-animation-engineer'). Click the copy button on any card to copy the install command to your clipboard, then run it in your terminal."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Is opencode OS free and open source?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Yes. All skills in the store are free. The showcase is a single-file PWA with zero build step, deployable on GitHub Pages or Vercel."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What is the command palette and how do I use it?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Press \u2318K (macOS) or Ctrl+K (Windows/Linux) to open the fuzzy-search command palette. Type to filter across all 90+ skills by name, category, or tags. Use arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select, and Escape to close."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Does opencode OS work offline?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Yes. The site is a Progressive Web App with a service worker that caches the full app shell for offline use. Install it to your home screen via your browser's install prompt."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What are MCP servers and how do the stacks work?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers extend AI agents with tools, resources, and prompts. The store includes 8 pre-built MCP stacks with synergy scoring \u2014 each stack is a curated combination of MCP servers that work together to solve specific developer workflows."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Can I use opencode OS on mobile?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Yes. The entire UI is responsive and touch-optimized. Install it as a PWA on iOS (Share then Add to Home Screen) or Android (Chrome then Install App) for a native-like experience."
      }
    }
  ]
}
  </script>

  <style>
    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       RESET & TOKENS
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg-base: #05060A;
      --bg-surface: #0C0D12;
      --bg-elevated: #12141C;
      --bg-card: #151720;
      --bg-card-hover: #1A1D2A;
      --bg-overlay: rgba(5,6,10,0.92);
      --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      --border-hover: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
      --border-active: rgba(255,255,255,0.22);
      --text-0: #F8F9FC;
      --text-1: #C4C9D8;
      --text-2: #7C849B;
      --text-3: #4A5168;
      --purple: #8B5CF6;
      --purple-dim: rgba(139,92,246,0.12);
      --purple-glow: rgba(139,92,246,0.25);
      --cyan: #06B6D4;
      --green: #10B981;
      --orange: #F97316;
      --yellow: #EAB308;
      --teal: #14B8A6;
      --rose: #F43F5E;
      --amber: #F59E0B;
      --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
      --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
      --radius: 10px;
      --radius-lg: 14px;
      --radius-pill: 9999px;
      --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
      --ease-spring: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
      --nav-h: 52px;
      --subnav-h: 44px;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; }

    body {
      font-family: var(--font-sans);
      background: var(--bg-base);
      color: var(--text-0);
      line-height: 1.5;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    /* Atmospheric gradient backdrop */
    body::before {
      content: '';
      position: fixed; inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 35% at 15% 5%, rgba(139,92,246,0.06), transparent),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 45% 45% at 85% 95%, rgba(6,182,212,0.04), transparent),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 35% 25% at 55% 45%, rgba(139,92,246,0.02), transparent);
      pointer-events: none; z-index: -1;
    }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       SCROLLBAR
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; height: 5px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 3px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       TOP NAV (Glassmorphic Sticky)
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .top-nav {
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
      height: var(--nav-h);
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      padding: 0 16px;
      background: rgba(5,6,10,0.82);
      backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    .nav-brand {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer;
      padding: 4px;
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      transition: background 120ms;
    }
    .nav-brand:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
    .nav-brand .logo { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1; }
    .nav-brand .title {
      font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
      white-space: nowrap; color: var(--text-0);
    }
    .nav-brand .version {
      font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700;
      padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
      background: var(--purple-dim);
      color: var(--purple);
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
    }

    .nav-zones {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px;
      overflow-x: auto; flex: 1; justify-content: center;
      scrollbar-width: none; -ms-overflow-style: none;
      padding: 3px;
    }
    .nav-zones::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

    .zone-tab {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
      white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer;
      border: 1px solid transparent;
      background: transparent; color: var(--text-2);
      transition: all 120ms var(--ease-out);
    }
    .zone-tab:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: var(--text-1); }
    .zone-tab.active {
      background: var(--purple-dim);
      color: var(--purple);
      border-color: rgba(139,92,246,0.18);
    }
    .zone-tab:focus-visible {
      outline: 2px solid var(--purple);
      outline-offset: 2px;
    }
    .zone-tab .z-icon { font-size: 12px; }

    .nav-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .cmd-trigger {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: var(--radius);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--bg-surface);
      color: var(--text-3);
      cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px;
      font-family: var(--font-sans);
      transition: all 120ms;
    }
    .cmd-trigger:hover { border-color: var(--border-hover); color: var(--text-2); }
    .cmd-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--purple); outline-offset: 2px; }
    .cmd-trigger .kbd {
      font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
      padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 4px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       SUB-NAV (Dynamic Horizontal Pills)
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .sub-nav {
      position: sticky; top: var(--nav-h); z-index: 90;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      scrollbar-width: none;
      background: rgba(5,6,10,0.88);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(160%);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(160%);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .sub-nav::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

    .sub-pill {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500;
      white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: transparent; color: var(--text-2);
      transition: all 120ms;
    }
    .sub-pill:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); color: var(--text-1); }
    .sub-pill.active {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      color: var(--text-0);
      border-color: var(--border-hover);
    }
    .sub-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--purple); outline-offset: 2px; }
    .sub-pill .pill-count {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700;
      padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
      color: var(--text-3);
    }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       HERO
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .hero {
      padding: 56px 16px 40px;
      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
    }
    .hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(139,92,246,0.10), transparent);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .hero-badge {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      padding: 5px 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
      background: var(--purple-dim);
      border: 1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.15);
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--purple);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .hero h1 {
      font-size: clamp(32px, 5.5vw, 56px);
      font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.04em;
      line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .hero h1 .gradient-text {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8B5CF6 0%, #06B6D4 50%, #8B5CF6 100%);
      background-size: 200% auto;
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      animation: shimmer 5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes shimmer {
      0%, 100% { background-position: 0% center; }
      50% { background-position: 200% center; }
    }
    .hero .subtitle {
      font-size: clamp(14px, 1.8vw, 16px);
      color: var(--text-2); max-width: 520px;
      margin: 0 auto 28px; line-height: 1.65;
    }
    .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .hero-btn {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
      padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: var(--radius);
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-sans);
      cursor: pointer; border: none;
      transition: all 150ms var(--ease-out);
    }
    .hero-btn-primary {
      background: var(--purple); color: #fff;
    }
    .hero-btn-primary:hover { background: #7C4FE0; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(139,92,246,0.3); }
    .hero-btn-ghost {
      background: transparent; color: var(--text-1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .hero-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--border-hover); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); }
    .hero-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--purple); outline-offset: 2px; }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       STATS
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .stats-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      gap: 8px; padding: 0 16px 32px;
      max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto;
    }
    @media (min-width: 640px) { .stats-row { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

    .stat-card {
      padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: var(--radius);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      text-align: center;
      transition: all 150ms var(--ease-out);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    .stat-card.visible { opacity: 1; }
    .stat-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
    .stat-val {
      font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    }
    .stat-lbl { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; font-weight: 500; }
    .stat-card:nth-child(1) .stat-val { color: var(--purple); }
    .stat-card:nth-child(2) .stat-val { color: var(--cyan); }
    .stat-card:nth-child(3) .stat-val { color: var(--teal); }
    .stat-card:nth-child(4) .stat-val { color: var(--amber); }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       CONTENT AREA
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .content-area {
      padding: 0 16px 40px;
      max-width: 1440px; margin: 0 auto;
      width: 100%;
    }
    .section-bar {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .section-title {
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-2);
      text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    }
    .section-count {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3);
      padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    }

    .skills-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    @media (min-width: 640px) { .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
    @media (min-width: 1024px) { .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); } }
    @media (min-width: 1440px) { .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       SKILL CARD
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .skill-card {
      padding: 14px; border-radius: var(--radius);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 160ms var(--ease-out);
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      opacity: 0;
    }
    .skill-card.visible { opacity: 1; }
    .skill-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--card-accent, var(--purple));
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity 160ms;
    }
    .skill-card:hover {
      border-color: var(--border-hover);
      transform: translateY(-2px);

       COMMAND PALETTE
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    .cmd-overlay {
      position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 200;
      background: rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
      backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      display: none; align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 14vh 16px 0;
    }
    .cmd-overlay.visible { display: flex; }

    .cmd-box {
      width: 100%; max-width: 600px;
      background: var(--bg-elevated);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-hover);
      border-radius: 16px;
      box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px rgba(139,92,246,0.08);
      overflow: hidden;
      animation: cmdIn 0.18s var(--ease-out);
    }
    @keyframes cmdIn {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.97) translateY(-6px); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
    }

    .cmd-bar {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .cmd-icon { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .cmd-input {
      flex: 1; background: none; border: none; outline: none;

      padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 5px;

      color: var(--text-3);
    }

    .cmd-results {
      max-height: 380px; overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 6px;
    }
    .cmd-group {
      font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-3);
      text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      padding: 8px 10px 4px;
    }
    .cmd-item {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 80ms;
    }
    .cmd-item:hover, .cmd-item.focused { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
    .cmd-item-icon { font-size: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .cmd-item-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .cmd-item-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }
    .cmd-item-desc {
      font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3);
      white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .cmd-item-zone {

      padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);

    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       REDUCED MOTION
       ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

  </style>
</head>

  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  // FUZZY SEARCH
  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  function fuzzyMatch(query, text) {
    const q = query.toLowerCase();
    const t = text.toLowerCase();
    if (t.includes(q)) return 1;
    let qi = 0, score = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < t.length && qi < q.length; i++) {
      if (t[i] === q[qi]) { score++; qi++; }
    }
    return qi === q.length ? score / q.length : 0;
  }

  function fuzzySearch(query) {
    if (!query.trim()) return SKILLS_DATA;
    const scored = SKILLS_DATA.map(s => {
      let best = 0;
      best = Math.max(best, fuzzyMatch(query, s.name) * 1.5);
      best = Math.max(best, fuzzyMatch(query, s.description));
      best = Math.max(best, fuzzyMatch(query, s.category) * 1.2);
      s.tags.forEach(t => { best = Math.max(best, fuzzyMatch(query, t) * 1.3); });
      return { skill: s, score: best };
    }).filter(x => x.score > 0).sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
    return scored.map(x => x.skill);
  }

  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  // ZONE SWITCHING
  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  function switchZone(zoneKey) {
    if (!ZONES[zoneKey]) return;
    const targetEl = document.getElementById('zone-' + zoneKey);
    const hasContent = targetEl && targetEl.querySelector('.skills-grid');
    if (currentZone === zoneKey && !showingAllSkills && hasContent) return;
    currentZone = zoneKey;
    showingAllSkills = false;

    document.querySelectorAll('.zone-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.zone === zoneKey));
    document.querySelectorAll('.zone-content').forEach(e => e.classList.remove('active'));
    if (targetEl) targetEl.classList.add('active');

    // Hero visibility: ONLY show on ACTIVATE zone (default landing).
    // Hidden on BUILD, VALIDATE, PLAYBOOK, MONETIZE, SYSTEM, and the "all skills" view.
    const heroEl = document.getElementById('heroSection');
    if (heroEl) {
      const shouldShow = zoneKey === 'activate';
      heroEl.style.display = shouldShow ? '' : 'none';
      // Optional subtle fade for elegance
      try {
        if (!window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches && typeof gsap !== 'undefined' && shouldShow) {
          gsap.fromTo(heroEl, { opacity: 0, y: -6 }, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.28, ease: 'power2.out', overwrite: true });
        }
      } catch (e) { /* no-op */ }
    }

    try { renderZoneContent(zoneKey); } catch(e) { console.error('renderZoneContent:', e); }
    try { renderSubNav(zoneKey); } catch(e) { console.error('renderSubNav:', e); }

    document.body.className = 'zone-' + zoneKey;

    // Zone transition animation (optional, wrapped in try/catch — zone is already visible)
    try {
      const noMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
      if (!noMotion && targetEl && typeof gsap !== 'undefined') {
        gsap.fromTo(targetEl, { opacity: 0, y: 8 }, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.22, ease: 'power2.out', overwrite: true });
      }
    } catch(e) { /* zone already visible */ }

    try {
      const url = new URL(window.location);
      url.searchParams.set('zone', zoneKey);
      window.history.pushState({ zone: zoneKey }, '', url);
    } catch(e) {}

    document.getElementById('contentArea')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    animateCards();
  }

                    SKILLS_DATA.find(s => s.name === r.name);

    if (components && components.length) {
      html += `<div style="margin-top:10px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-2);font-family:var(--font-mono);letter-spacing:0.5px;">🧩 21ST.DEV COMPONENTS</div>`;
      components.forEach(c => {

'…' : ''}</div>` : ''}${c.url ? `<a href="${escapeHtml(c.url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--cyan);text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;margin-top:2px;">↗ View on 21st.dev</a>` : ''}</div><span class="rec-score" style="color:var(--cyan);">${escapeHtml(compScore)}</span></div>`;

  async function sendChat() {
    const input = document.getElementById('chatInput');
    const msg = input.value.trim();
    if (!msg) return;
    const msgs = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
    msgs.innerHTML += `<div class="chat-msg user">${escapeHtml(msg)}</div>`;
    input.value = '';

    // Show typing indicator
    const typingId = 'typing-' + Date.now();
    msgs.innerHTML += `<div class="chat-msg bot" id="${typingId}" style="opacity:0.6;"><span>⚡ Thinking</span><span class="typing-dots">...</span></div>`;
    msgs.scrollTop = msgs.scrollHeight;

    // Try the AI Gateway edge function first
    let reply = '', recs = [], source = '', components = null;
    try {
      const ctrl = new AbortController();
      const t = setTimeout(() => ctrl.abort(), 8000);
      const res = await fetch('/api/recommend', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: msg }),
        signal: ctrl.signal,
      });
      clearTimeout(t);
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        reply = data.reply || '';
        recs = data.recommendations || [];
        components = data.components || null;
        // Source badge: show both layers when hybrid
        if (data.source === 'hybrid') source = 'AI Gateway + 21st.dev';
        else if (data.source === '21st-dev') source = '21st.dev + Rules';
        else if (data.source === 'ai-gateway') source = 'AI Gateway';
        else source = (data.source || '');
      } else {
        throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      // Network/timeout/non-OK — fall back to local INTENT_MAP
      const intent = matchIntent(msg);
      if (intent) {
        reply = intent.message;
        recs = intent.responses.map(r => ({ name: r.name, slug: r.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'-'), score: r.score, reason: '' }));
        source = 'offline-rules';
      } else {
        const defaults = {};
        SKILLS_DATA.forEach(s => { if (!defaults[s.category]) defaults[s.category] = s; });
        reply = "I'll show you top picks from each category:";
        recs = Object.values(defaults).map(s => ({ name: s.name, slug: (s.slug || s.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'-')), score: 0, reason: '', category: s.category }));
        source = 'offline-defaults';
      }
    }

    // Remove typing indicator, render result
    document.getElementById(typingId)?.remove();
    msgs.innerHTML += renderRecommendations(reply, recs, source, components);
    msgs.scrollTop = msgs.scrollHeight;
  }

  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  function animateCards() {
    // Only animate cards in the ACTIVE zone (not all zones globally)
    // This prevents cards in hidden zones from blocking stagger timing
    const activeZone = document.querySelector('.zone-content.active');
    const scope = activeZone || document;
    const cards = scope.querySelectorAll('.skill-card:not(.visible), .agent-card:not(.visible), .stack-card:not(.visible), .stat-card:not(.visible)');
    if (!cards.length) return;

    // CRITICAL: Mark cards visible IMMEDIATELY so they're never stuck at opacity:0
    // even if GSAP fails, errors, or is slow to load
    cards.forEach(c => c.classList.add('visible'));

    // Progressive enhancement: subtle entrance animation
    // Wrapped in try/catch so any GSAP failure is silent (cards already visible)
    try {
      const noMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
      if (noMotion || typeof gsap === 'undefined') return;
      gsap.fromTo(cards,
        { opacity: 0, y: 14 },
        { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.28, stagger: 0.018, ease: 'power2.out', overwrite: true }
      );
    } catch(e) { /* cards already visible, animation is optional */ }
  }

  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  // URL API ENDPOINTS
  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  function handleURLParams() {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);

    if (params.get('format') === 'json') {
      document.body.innerHTML = `<pre style="padding:20px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:#F8F9FC;background:#05060A;white-space:pre-wrap;">${JSON.stringify(SKILLS_DATA, null, 2)}</pre>`;
      return true;
    }
    if (params.get('format') === 'manifest') {
      const manifest = { name: "opencode OS", version: "24.0.0", skills: SKILLS_DATA.map(s => ({ name: s.name, category: s.category, installCommand: s.installCommand })) };
      document.body.innerHTML = `<pre style="padding:20px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:#F8F9FC;background:#05060A;white-space:pre-wrap;">${JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2)}</pre>`;
      return true;
    }
    const skillParam = params.get('skill');
    if (skillParam) {
      const skill = SKILLS_DATA.find(s => s.name === skillParam);
      if (skill) { document.body.innerHTML = `<pre style="padding:20px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:#F8F9FC;background:#05060A;white-space:pre-wrap;">${JSON.stringify(skill, null, 2)}</pre>`; return true; }
    }
    const catParam = params.get('category');
    if (catParam) {
      const skills = SKILLS_DATA.filter(s => s.category === catParam);
      document.body.innerHTML = `<pre style="padding:20px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:#F8F9FC;background:#05060A;white-space:pre-wrap;">${JSON.stringify(skills, null, 2)}</pre>`;
      return true;
    }
    if (params.get('embed') === 'true') {
      ['top-nav', 'subNav', 'app-footer', 'heroSection'].forEach(id => {
        const el = document.getElementById(id) || document.querySelector('.' + id.replace(/([A-Z])/g, '-$1').toLowerCase());
        if (el) el.style.display = 'none';
      });
      document.querySelector('.top-nav').style.display = 'none';
      document.querySelector('.sub-nav').style.display = 'none';
      document.querySelector('.app-footer').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('heroSection').style.display = 'none';
    }
    const palette = params.get('palette');
    if (palette === 'supanova') { document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--purple', '#A855F7'); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--purple-dim', 'rgba(168,85,247,0.12)'); }
    else if (palette === 'ocean') { document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--purple', '#06B6D4'); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--purple-dim', 'rgba(6,182,212,0.12)'); }
    else if (palette === 'ember') { document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--purple', '#F97316'); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--purple-dim', 'rgba(249,115,22,0.12)'); }
    else if (palette === 'neon') { document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--purple', '#10B981'); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--purple-dim', 'rgba(16,185,129,0.12)'); }

    if (params.get('action') === 'search') setTimeout(() => openPalette(), 500);
    if (params.get('section') === 'agent-spotlight') setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('agentsSection')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }), 500);
    if (params.get('section') === 'mcp-stacks') setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('stacksSection')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }), 500);
    return false;
  }

  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  // EVENT DELEGATION
  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  function setupEvents() {
    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const t = e.target;
      const actionEl = t.closest('[data-action]');
      const action = actionEl ? actionEl.getAttribute('data-action') : null;

      if (action === 'switchZone') { e.preventDefault(); const zone = actionEl.getAttribute('data-zone'); if (zone) switchZone(zone); return; }
      if (action === 'openPalette') { e.preventDefault(); openPalette(); return; }
      if (action === 'showAll') { e.preventDefault(); showAllSkillsFn(); return; }
      if (action === 'toggleChat') { e.preventDefault(); toggleChat(); return; }
      if (action === 'sendChat') { e.preventDefault(); sendChat(); return; }
      if (action === 'toggleDetails') { e.stopPropagation(); const card = actionEl.closest('.skill-card'); if (card) toggleExpand(card); return; }

      const copyBtn = t.closest('.card-btn-copy');
      if (copyBtn) { e.stopPropagation(); const cmd = copyBtn.getAttribute('data-copy'); if (cmd) copyInstall(cmd, copyBtn); return; }

      const card = t.closest('.skill-card');
      if (card && !t.closest('.card-actions') && !t.closest('.card-btn')) { toggleExpand(card); return; }

      const pill = t.closest('.sub-pill');
      if (pill) { e.preventDefault(); filterSubNav(pill); return; }

      const agentCard = t.closest('.agent-card');
      if (agentCard) { const cmd = agentCard.getAttribute('data-install'); if (cmd) copyInstall(cmd, null); agentCard.style.borderColor = 'var(--green)'; agentCard.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 1px var(--green)'; setTimeout(() => { agentCard.style.borderColor = ''; agentCard.style.boxShadow = ''; }, 1400); return; }

      const stackCard = t.closest('.stack-card');
      if (stackCard) { const servers = stackCard.getAttribute('data-servers'); if (servers) copyInstall(servers, null); stackCard.style.borderColor = 'var(--green)'; setTimeout(() => { stackCard.style.borderColor = ''; }, 1400); return; }

      const cmdItem = t.closest('.cmd-item');
      if (cmdItem) { const skillName = cmdItem.getAttribute('data-skill'); if (skillName) selectCmdItem(skillName); return; }
    });

    // Chat Enter key
    document.getElementById('chatInput')?.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); sendChat(); }
    });

    // Command palette overlay click-outside
    document.getElementById('cmdOverlay')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (e.target === document.getElementById('cmdOverlay')) closePalette();
    });

    // Keyboard shortcuts
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      const overlay = document.getElementById('cmdOverlay');
      if (!overlay.classList.contains('visible')) {
        if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') { e.preventDefault(); openPalette(); }
        return;
      }
      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
        const els = overlay.querySelectorAll('input, button, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');
        if (e.shiftKey) { if (document.activeElement === els[0]) { e.preventDefault(); els[els.length - 1].focus(); } }
        else { if (document.activeElement === els[els.length - 1]) { e.preventDefault(); els[0].focus(); } }
        return;
      }
      if (e.key === 'Escape') { closePalette(); return; }
      const items = document.querySelectorAll('.cmd-item');
      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') { e.preventDefault(); cmdIdx = Math.min(cmdIdx + 1, items.length - 1); updateCmdFocus(items); }
      else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') { e.preventDefault(); cmdIdx = Math.max(cmdIdx - 1, 0); updateCmdFocus(items); }
      else if (e.key === 'Enter' && cmdIdx >= 0 && items[cmdIdx]) { e.preventDefault(); items[cmdIdx].click(); }
    });

    function updateCmdFocus(items) {
      items.forEach((item, i) => { item.classList.toggle('focused', i === cmdIdx); if (i === cmdIdx) item.scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' }); });
    }

    // Command palette search with debounce
    let debounce;
    document.getElementById('cmdInput')?.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
      clearTimeout(debounce);
      debounce = setTimeout(() => renderCmdResults(e.target.value), 120);
    });

    // Enter on skill cards
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') { const card = e.target.closest('.skill-card'); if (card && !e.target.closest('.card-btn')) toggleExpand(card); }
    });
  }

  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  // INIT
  // ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  function init() {
    if (window.__osInit) return;
    window.__osInit = true;

    if (handleURLParams()) return;

    if (typeof gsap !== 'undefined' && typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

    document.body.className = 'zone-activate';
    Object.keys(ZONES).forEach(z => { try { renderZoneContent(z); } catch(e) { console.error('Zone render:', z, e); } });
    try { renderSubNav('activate'); } catch(e) { console.error('SubNav:', e); }
    renderAgents();
    renderStacks();
    setupEvents();

    // URL zone navigation
    const zoneParam = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('zone');
    if (zoneParam === 'all') showAllSkillsFn();
    else if (zoneParam && ZONES[zoneParam]) switchZone(zoneParam);

    // Entrance animations
    setTimeout(() => {
      animateCards();
      // Mark agent/stack cards visible immediately (ScrollTrigger is optional polish)
      document.querySelectorAll('.agents-section .agent-card, .stacks-section .stack-card').forEach(c => c.classList.add('visible'));
      // Optional scroll-reveal enhancement (cards already visible, this just adds subtle motion)
      try {
        if (typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined' && typeof gsap !== 'undefined') {
          gsap.utils.toArray('.agents-section .agent-card:not(.scroll-animated), .stacks-section .stack-card:not(.scroll-animated)').forEach(card => {
            card.classList.add('scroll-animated');
            gsap.fromTo(card, { y: 14 }, {
              y: 0, duration: 0.35, ease: 'power2.out', overwrite: true,
              scrollTrigger: { trigger: card, start: 'top 90%', once: true }
            });
          });
        }
      } catch(e) { /* cards already visible */ }
    }, 120);

    // Service worker
    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) navigator.serviceWorker.register('sw.js').catch(() => {});
  }

  // Boot
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  else init();

  // Browser back/forward
  window.addEventListener('popstate', (e) => {
    if (e.state?.zone) {
      if (e.state.zone === 'all') showAllSkillsFn();
      else if (ZONES[e.state.zone]) switchZone(e.state.zone);
    } else switchZone('activate');
  });
  </script>


</body></html>
